theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Soft Utility
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Indian Kirana and retail shops need maximum legibility, trust (clear financial data), and approachability. High-contrast Swiss ensures numbers (Udhaar/Sales) are hyper-readable, while Soft Utility fonts keep the app friendly for non-tech-savvy users.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense information architecture but generous padding to avoid misclicks by shopkeepers.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room) for Dashboard. Mobile-first grid-cols-1, scaling to grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 on desktop.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4 for mobile cards, p-6 to p-8 for desktop cards. gap-4 for dense lists, gap-6 for dashboard widgets.

component_styles.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no shadow default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
component_styles.buttons: Rounded-lg for approachability. Primary buttons use Trust Blue. WhatsApp actions MUST use whatsapp_green with text-white.
component_styles.inputs: Shadcn inputs heavily customized with h-12 (larger touch targets), border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary focus:border-brand-primary.
component_styles.badges: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Status colors: Red (Udhaar due / Dead stock), Green (Paid / Fast stock), Amber (Low stock).
component_styles.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-16 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center z-50. Hidden on md (desktop).
component_styles.sidebar: Hidden on mobile. Fixed w-64 h-screen border-r border-slate-200 bg-white left-0 top-0 on md (desktop).

mobile_first_patterns.pos_billing: Wizard flow. Large numeric keypad targets. Barcode scanner button prominent.
mobile_first_patterns.tables: Convert horizontal tables to vertical Card Lists on mobile to prevent horizontal scrolling.
mobile_first_patterns.actions: Floating Action Button (FAB) or sticky bottom bars for main actions (e.g., 'Add Bill', 'Add Udhaar').

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons for every menu item and action to assist non-reading/fast-scanning shopkeepers.

testing_requirements.data_testid: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-reminder-button', data-testid='dashboard-add-bill').

empty_inventory.description: Minimalist display of three boxed products on a white shelf. Use for Empty State in Inventory.

shop_illustration.description: A small toy store with a green background. Use for welcome screen or empty CRM state.

user_avatar.description: Cartoon character avatar. Use as placeholder for Customer profiles in CRM/Udhaar ledger.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using standard React (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI components. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
Prioritize Mobile-First design: Ensure the bottom navigation bar is visible and functional on mobile screens (< 768px).
Translate critical labels into Hinglish as requested: 'Aaj ka kaam', 'Udhaar', 'Stock khatam hone wala hai', 'Dukaan AI Copilot'.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for financial digits and apply 'tabular-nums' to ensure proper alignment of decimal points in ledgers.
The Dashboard must have an 'AI Business Advisor' panel summarizing insights in Hinglish.
For WhatsApp reminders, use the exact WhatsApp Green color (#25D366) for the button background and text-white.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) without fail.
Pre-seed the app with Indian kirana demo data (e.g., Aashirvaad Atta, Parle-G, local names like 'Ramesh Store' or 'Suresh Udhaar').
Ensure high contrast ratios: Do not use light gray text on white background. Rely on high-contrast text colors for accessibility.
Convert wide tables into Mobile-friendly Card/List views on small screens.
